mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_audit_log_h ( domain_type, system_main_cd, system_sub_cd, menu_code, menu_name_ko, action_code, action_name_ko, entity_type, entity_id, before_data, after_data, changed_fields, actor_user_id, request_id, request_ip, user_agent, created_by ) VALUES ( #{domainType}, #{systemMainCd}, #{systemSubCd}, #{menuCode}, #{menuNameKo}, #{actionCode}, #{actionNameKo}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, CAST(#{beforeData} AS JSONB), CAST(#{afterData} AS JSONB), CAST(#{changedFields} AS JSONB), #{actorUserId}, #{requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy} )

where.if: AND ( h.menu_name_ko ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.actor_user_id ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.entity_id ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.changed_fields::text ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT h.id , h.domain_type , h.system_main_cd , h.system_sub_cd , h.menu_code , h.menu_name_ko , h.action_code , h.action_name_ko , h.entity_type , h.entity_id , COALESCE(h.before_data::text, '{}') AS before_data , COALESCE(h.after_data::text, '{}') AS after_data , COALESCE(h.changed_fields::text, '[]') AS changed_fields , h.actor_user_id , to_char(h.acted_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS acted_at FROM om_audit_log_h h
ORDER BY h.acted_at DESC, h.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
